expectations.text: Tri-driver pattern: auto-detects Neon serverless vs Neon HTTP vs local pg based on URL and NEXT_RUNTIME
expectations.evidence: server__db__index.ts only uses @neondatabase/serverless with neon-http driver. No auto-detection logic, no NEXT_RUNTIME check, no local pg fallback. Hardcodes single driver: const sql = neon(process.env.DATABASE_URL); export const db = drizzle(sql, { schema });

expectations.text: Lazy proxy pattern: db instance doesn't eagerly connect on import
expectations.evidence: server__db__index.ts eagerly creates neon client and drizzle instance at module scope. No Proxy, no lazy initialization, no deferred connection pattern.

expectations.text: casing: 'snake_case' set in BOTH drizzle.config.ts AND client initialization
expectations.evidence: drizzle.config.ts has no casing property. Client init drizzle(sql, { schema }) also has no casing option. Column names are manually snake_cased in schema but no casing config is set.
services/database/users.ts is a client-side HTTP fetch wrapper. API routes directly use inline drizzle queries with no repository abstraction layer.

expectations.text: Root package.json has proxy scripts (drizzle-kit, db:seed, db:wipe)
expectations.evidence: Root package.json has db:generate, db:migrate, db:push, db:studio. Missing the specifically required scripts: drizzle-kit (direct proxy), db:seed, and db:wipe.

expectations.text: Docker Compose for local PostgreSQL development
expectations.evidence: No docker-compose file exists in the outputs. Only Neon cloud PostgreSQL is supported.
.env.example instructs renaming to .env.local. summary.md says create .env.local. server__db__index.ts error references .env.local. No mention of .env.development.
No PRODUCTION_DATABASE_HOSTNAME check or any production safety guard in any file. Only checks if DATABASE_URL is set.

expectations.text: All required dependencies in correct locations (drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, pg, dotenv, drizzle-kit, drizzle-seed, tsx, @types/pg)
expectations.evidence: Present: drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, dotenv, drizzle-kit. Missing: pg, drizzle-seed, tsx, @types/pg (4 of 8 required packages absent).

suggestions: Add tri-driver auto-detection using URL scheme and NEXT_RUNTIME to choose between Neon serverless, Neon HTTP, or local pg.
Use JavaScript Proxy for lazy db initialization to defer connection until first use.
Set casing: 'snake_case' in both drizzle.config.ts and drizzle() client call.
Create server-side repository modules to encapsulate database queries separate from route handlers.
Add Docker Compose for local PostgreSQL development.
Use .env.development instead of .env.local per SE-2 convention.
Add PRODUCTION_DATABASE_HOSTNAME safety guard to prevent accidental production operations.
Add missing dependencies: pg, drizzle-seed, tsx, @types/pg.
eval_feedback.overall: Scored 1/10. Only the services/database/ path convention passed. The implementation is a minimal Drizzle+Neon integration lacking all advanced patterns: no tri-driver detection, no lazy proxy, no casing config, no repository pattern, no Docker Compose, no .env.development, no production guard, and missing half the required dependencies.
